div1.entryFree: Marian, vulgar form of Mary or Maria: Tp. II, 2, 50. Err. III, 1, 31. LLL V, 2, 934. Shr. Ind. 2, 22. Tw. II, 3, 14. Maid M., a personage in the morris dances, often a man dressed like a woman, and sometimes a strumpet: for womanhood, Maid M. may be the deputy's wife of the ward to thee, H4A III, 3, 129.
